title: Microchip Technology Announces Promotion of Rich Simoncic
text: CHANDLER, Ariz., April 20, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) — Microchip Technology Inc. (Nasdaq: MCHP), a leading provider of smart, connected and secure embedded control solutions, today announced that its board of directors has promoted Rich Simoncic to Executive Vice President of Microchip. title: Microchip Technology Announces Promotion of Rich Simoncic to Executive Vice President
text: CHANDLER, Ariz., April 20, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Microchip Technology Inc. (Nasdaq: MCHP), a leading provider of smart, connected and secure embedded control solutions, today announced that its board of directors has promoted Rich Simoncic to Executive Vice President of Microchip.
